title: Aadu 2: The Return - Placeholder
description: A high-octane opening scene in the Kerala high ranges. Shaji Pappan and his team are seen celebrating after their many adventures. The background shows lush green hills and a comic title card reading 'AADU 2'. Shaji Pappan is leading the group with his signature style.

title: New Conflict - Placeholder
description: Shaji Pappan and Arakkal Abu are in deep discussion in the village market. There is a new mystery brewing. People in the background are whispering. Arakkal Abu looks worried while Shaji remains confident.
dialogue: Something is different this time, Shajiyetta.

title: Pinky's Return - Placeholder
description: Pinky, the small white hornless goat, is seen happily munching on some grass. Shaji Pappan approaches her with affection. The sun is setting, creating a warm comic glow.

title: The Antagonist Appears - Placeholder
description: A dark, mysterious figure is seen watching the group from a distance. The shadows are long and dramatic. This person seems to have a grudge against Shaji Pappan's team.
dialogue: They have no idea what's coming.

title: Planning the Mission - Placeholder
description: Shaji and the gang (Cleetus, Sarbath Shameer, Sasi) are huddled around a map. They are planning their next big move. The lighting is focused and intense.

title: The Chase Begins - Placeholder
description: A fast-paced chase sequence through the narrow roads of Kerala. The white van is back and driving at high speeds to evade someone. Dust is flying everywhere.
dialogue: Speed up! They're gaining on us!

title: Humorous Setback - Placeholder
description: A classic Aadu-style comedic moment. Shaji Pappan encounters an unexpected obstacle that leads to a funny tumble. His friends are reacting with a mix of help and laughter.

title: Confronting Dude - Placeholder
description: Shaji Pappan comes face to face with 'Dude' again. They are in a dramatic standoff. The background is a dusty construction site or warehouse.

title: The Twist - Placeholder
description: A major revelation occurs. Everyone is shocked. Shaji Pappan's expression is one of total disbelief as he realizes the truth about their quest.
dialogue: So it was you all along?

title: Prepare for the Final Battle - Placeholder
description: The team gears up for one last stand. They are putting on their iconic outfits and checking their gear. The energy is high and heroic.

title: The Grand Finale Brawl - Placeholder
description: A massive fight scene involving all the characters. It's chaotic but choreographed in a comic-book style with 'POW' and 'WHAM' text effects. Shaji is in his prime.

title: Success and Celebration - Placeholder
description: The mission is accomplished. Shaji Pappan and the gang are celebrating their victory. Pinky the goat is with them, and the final panel shows a sunset and 'THE END?' teaser.
